settings.title: Settings
settings.feedbackHint: Applies to match taps and toolbar feedback. Some browsers do not support vibration.
settings.qrAreaHint: Opens the match screen as view-only using target and serve above.
match.qrHint: Scan to open this match as read-only at this moment.
install.tagline: Forget “what's the score?”. The definitive scorekeeping app for every court worldwide.
install.msg.iosAddToHome: On iPhone / iPad, use Share → "Add to Home Screen" (same steps in Safari and Chrome).
install.msg.engagementWait: Chrome may not show the install dialog until you've spent some time on this site (about {{sec}} seconds left — stay on this screen).
install.msg.noPrompt: We can't open the install dialog from here. Use the Chrome / Edge menu (⋮) → "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen". If you're in an in-app browser (LINE, etc.), open in the system browser.
install.msg.installSlow: The completion notice is delayed. Please check install status from the browser menu.
install.msg.promptFailed: Could not start installation. Reload the page and try again.
install.chromeWait.beforeStrong: In Chrome, things are often ready after you've had this site open for about
install.menuFallback: If the button still doesn't work, reload the page or install from the Chrome / Edge menu.
install.ios.title: iPhone / iPad (Safari & Chrome)
install.ios.step3: Open from the icon on your Home Screen
install.slide.tagline.heading: Sports Score
install.slide.tagline.body: Forget "what's the score?". The definitive scorekeeping app for every court worldwide.
install.slide.sceneSelf.heading: Scene: Heated self‑officiated matches
install.slide.sceneSelf.body: No umpire at practice? Pull it from your pocket and keep score accurately—stay focused on the next shot.
install.slide.sceneRules.heading: Scene: Cut through rule confusion
install.slide.sceneRules.body: Rally point vs side‑out — switch scoring modes instantly in settings so any format stays clear.
install.slide.tap.heading: Features: Tap‑to‑score
install.slide.tap.body: Tap left or right to add points. A minimal UI that never gets in the way of the match.
install.slide.rules.heading: Features: Both official styles
install.slide.rules.body:
Rally point: every rally moves the score—fast, rally-style play.

Side‑out: only the serving side can score—serious competitive rules.
install.slide.serveGuide.heading: Features: Serve guide
install.slide.serveGuide.body: See who serves next and from which side; serve rotation updates automatically.
install.slide.sync.heading: ★ Live real‑time sync
install.slide.sync.body: Scores stay synced in the cloud—friends far away can follow the same moment on their phones.
